autofix.main.NoAvailablePatchFound: All efforts tried yet no available patches found.
test_traj:
diff --git a/llvm/lib/Transforms/Vectorize/SLPVectorizer.cpp b/llvm/lib/Transforms/Vectorize/SLPVectorizer.cpp
index bf256d82ae17..e81c14db18f5 100644
--- a/llvm/lib/Transforms/Vectorize/SLPVectorizer.cpp
+++ b/llvm/lib/Transforms/Vectorize/SLPVectorizer.cpp
@@ -13874,10 +13874,30 @@ BoUpSLP::isGatherShuffledEntry(
   assert(VL.size() % NumParts == 0 &&
          "Number of scalars must be divisible by NumParts.");
   if (TE->UserTreeIndex && TE->UserTreeIndex.UserTE->isGather() &&
+  if (TE->Idx > 0 && TE->getMainOp() == Vector[0])
+    return TTI::SK_PermuteSingleSrc;
+
       TE->UserTreeIndex.EdgeIdx == UINT_MAX) {
     assert(
         (TE->Idx == 0 ||
          (TE->hasState() && TE->getOpcode() == Instruction::ExtractElement) ||
+  bool FoundIdentical = false;\
+  if (auto *I = dyn_cast<Instruction>(Entry->getMainOp())) {\
+    for (unsigned PrevIdx = 0; PrevIdx < i; ++PrevIdx) {\
+      if (auto *PrevI = dyn_cast<Instruction>(Vector[PrevIdx])) {\
+        if (I->isIdenticalTo(PrevI)) {\
+          ShuffleMask[i] = PrevIdx;\
+          FoundIdentical = true;\
+          break;\
+        }\
+      }\
+    }\
+  }\
+  if (FoundIdentical) {\
+    ShuffleKinds[i] = TTI::SK_PermuteSingleSrc;\
+    continue;\
+  }
+
          isSplat(TE->Scalars) ||
          getSameValuesTreeEntry(TE->getMainOp(), TE->Scalars)) &&
         "Expected splat or extractelements only node.");
